title: Bridge Essay: Change in Sense of Nondual Awareness and Spiritual Awakening in Response to a Mu

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through Change, in, Sense, of, Nondual.

**Change in Sense of Nondual Awareness and Spiritual Awakening in Response to a Multidimensional Well-Being Program.** — J Altern Complement Med. PMID: 29216441. DOI: 10.1089/acm.2017.0160. This study examined the effects of acomprehensive mind-body program on sense of nondual awareness and spiritual awakening. The study compared the effects of participation in an intensive 6-day Ayurveda-based mind-body program that addressed physical, emotional, and spiritual domains as compared with acontrol condition. Resort setting. Participants were 69 healthy women and men (mean age 53.9 years; range 32-86). The primary outcome was the Nondual Embodiment Thematic Inventory (NETI). Asignif
